result:
All 11 tests pass. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

- **`init`** - Creates `.minigit/{objects,commits,index,HEAD}` structure; prints message if already exists
- **`add <file>`** - Computes MiniHash (FNV-1a variant), stores blob under `.minigit/objects/<hash>`, appends to index if not present; exits 1 with "File not found" if missing
- **`commit -m <msg>`** - Builds commit content with sorted filenames, hashes it with MiniHash, writes to `.minigit/commits/<hash>`, updates HEAD, clears index; exits 1 with "Nothing to commit" if index empty
- **`log`** - Traverses parent chain from HEAD printing `commit/Date/Message` blocks; prints "No commits" if HEAD empty

The only change to build files was fixing `build.sh` to embed an absolute classpath in the generated `minigit` launcher (necessary since tests invoke it as `../minigit` from a subdirectory).
